macro.title: Mortgage Rates May Swing This Week As Markets Watch Inflation and Iran Developments
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: Rates are likely to stay choppy this week as markets weigh new inflation data on Tuesday against any developments in the peace talks with Iran
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Redfin Launches Sunscore to Show Exactly How Much Sunlight Homes Get
macro.what: This 0-100 score is available exclusively on Redfin.com and helps home searchers easily understand property-level sun exposure
macro.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
macro.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates Likely to Hold Steady After April Jobs Report Shows Stronger Hiring, Softer Wages
macro.what: Takeaway: A mixed bag April jobs report will keep mortgage rates mostly steady as stronger-than-expected hiring lowers recession risk
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Greg Hague of 72SOLD on why ‘private’ listings will save our industry
housing.what: Greg Hague says state regulators handle fair housing, and argues private listings do not require MLS policing of agents.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Inventory growth making housing more affordable
housing.what: With inventory at multiyear highs, NAR prices are up 0.9% year over year versus 3.6% wage growth, easing affordability pressure.
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Policy uncertainty takes center stage as AMH reports revenue gains
housing.what: AMH reported record spring leasing activity, 2.8% year-over-year revenue growth, and 95.1% occupied days in Q1 2026
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Kim Hoffman on leadership, AI and pushing beyond self-imposed limits
housing.what: Kim Hoffman, President of Mortgage Connect Risk Solutions and a multi-year Women of Influence honoree, shares how risk-taking, curiosity and a fearless mindset shaped her 40-year career in mortgage leadership
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Redfin Survey: U.S. Residents Prioritize Sunlight Over Home Size—and It Affects How Happy They Are at Home
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: The Price Point: What $250,000 Buys in These Best Cities for New Grads
housing.what: In this edition of The Price Point—a weekly series where Redfin data journalists explore current housing inventory across a rotating combination of budgets and metro areas—we’re shifting our focus toward a few of the best cities for new college grads, according to Redfin’s latest report on the subject (conducted in partnership with Glassdoor)
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Just Listed in Texas: A $12 Million Lakefront Estate That’s Luxurious Inside and Out
housing.what: In this edition of Just Listed–a series from Redfin News that explores listings that are listed by Redfin or Compass agents on Redfin.com–we’re exploring a Mediterranean-inspired estate in Austin, Texas
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: Bright MLS launches Bright Promote ad tool in listing platform
notables.what: Bright MLS launched Bright Promote, letting agents run Facebook, Instagram and mail campaigns in-platform with budgets and insights.
notables.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
notables.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: PropLogix releases sales outreach tool for title companies
notables.what: The platform monitors listing activity, evaluates context around transactions and helps trigger personalized outreach opportunities.
notables.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
notables.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: Equity-rich home share falls to lowest level since 2021
notables.what: The Q1 share of equity-rich homes rose in only three states from the fourth quarter of 2025 and in six states from a year earlier.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: CEO Kaz Nejatian says Opendoor has fixed its ‘fatal flaw’
notables.what: Opendoor reported $720 million Q1 2026 revenue and a $173 million net loss, while claiming faster resales and better cohort stability.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: eXp’s next act: ‘Maximum optionality’ for agents and brokers says Leo Pareja
notables.what: The company reported first quarter revenue of $1.0 billion, up 5% year-over-year, while adjusted EBITDA rose 88% to $4.1 million.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: UWM controlling shareholder stops structured stock sales
notables.what: Mat Ishbia’s effort to expand the public float and trading liquidity of UWM Holdings Corporation has come to an end as the company pursues its acquisition of Two Harbors Investment
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
